variants: Elodie Vanel is an esteemed authority specializing in anthropological linguistics and currently resides in Pearlbranch Ridge. She has authored the influential work Underwood Search Array, which explores the nuances of language within cultural contexts. Her remarkable contributions to the field were acknowledged when she was awarded the prestigious Golden Compass Token. Elodie also plays an active role in the Thorngate Locksmiths Union, where she merges her linguistic expertise with an enthusiasm for locksmithing.
